pi_items.source: Task instructions in setup_task.sh and verification logic in verifier.py enforce this exact path.
Parsed the underlying SampleDivesV2.ssrf XML file directly; it contains exactly 29 <dive> elements.
Task instructions and the verification logic in verifier.py mandate and validate standard CSV format.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real dive data from the official Subsurface SampleDivesV2.ssrf file. The original logbook file is verified to contain exactly 29 dive records. The task requires exporting all 29 dives into a standard CSV format and saving the resulting file strictly to '/home/ga/Documents/dive_log.csv', which is confirmed by both the task instructions and the verifier script.
